title: Provenance
description: Reusable provenance vocabulary for lineage-bearing documents. Consumer schemas reference individual $defs via cross-file $ref, e.g. {"$ref": "provenance-schema#/$defs/producer"}.

producer.title: Producer
producer.description: The skill that generated this document. Use 'manual' for hand-authored files. New lineage-producing skills must be added here via register-skill.

source.title: Source
source.description: What this document was derived from. Null means this document is the root of its lineage chain. When kind is 'seed' or 'prd', ref must be a non-null path string. When kind is 'session', ref must be null (the document was generated directly from a conversation).

kind.description: Category of upstream document. 'seed': a to-seed JSON file. 'prd': an HTML/MD PRD rendered from a seed. 'session': generated directly from a conversation with no persistent upstream document.

ref.description: Path or URL to the upstream document. Null when kind is 'session'; non-null string when kind is 'seed' or 'prd'.
